metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_5246
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 8h: Electron microscopy of mouse cerebellum with DAB-labeling for ANP32E (aka. Cpd1) showed localization to presynaptic vesicle membranes, postsynaptic densities and vacuoles resembling postsynaptic endosomes.. Experimental description: M&M: "Electron microscopy
Adult male mice were subjected to intracardiac perfusion with saline, followed by 4% paraformaldehyde in 0.1 m cacodylate. Adult male animals were anaesthetized. Brains were extracted, and 40-um-thick vibratome sections were obtained and stained for Anp32e/Cpd1, PP2A or control with a peroxidase-coupled secondary antibody, followed by a DAB-labelling reaction as indicated in the immunohistochemistry section."

antibody:
"Two polyclonal antibodies recognizing murine Anp32e/Cpd1, Cpd1a and Cpd1b were generated. Cpd1a was raised against a synthetic peptide including amino acids 87-101 (CPNLTYLNLSGNKIK) and Cpd1b recognizing amino acids 23-35 (VLDNCLCVNGEIE)."

BLAST against mouse proteome confirmed that both peptides match gene ANP32E.
